ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compression_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression scheme */,
  "scheme_description" TEXT /* Description of the compression scheme */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio for the scheme */,
  "compression_algorithm" TEXT /* Compression algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "device_category" TEXT /* Category of the device (e.g., earpiece, headphone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression scheme associated with the device */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Manufacture date of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES compression_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume mapping */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the volume mapping */,
  "volume_levels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of volume levels */,
  "decibel_levels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of decibel levels */,
  "frequency_response" TEXT /* Frequency response of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_mappings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the calibration */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "technician_email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "technician_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, administrator, quality control specialist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the audit */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the history entry */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "calibration_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the configuration setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the configuration setting (e.g., dB, Hz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the calibration setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the calibration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the calibration setting */,
  "setting_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the calibration setting (e.g., dB, Hz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_date FOREIGN KEY ("report_date") REFERENCES calibrations ("calibration_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the analytics entry */,
  "analytics_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics entry */,
  "analytics_value" TEXT /* Value of the analytics entry */,
  "analytics_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the analytics entry (e.g., %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
